title: 硝子の少女は学びたい

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm researching something in the library after
school when Mejiro Ardan walks in.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
choice_data_list: You all right? You look dizzy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm fine... Thanks for asking... but you
needn't worry. I'm used to it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: More importantly, there's a book I need to find.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, here it is. Volume twenty-eight of the Twinkle Series Almanac.
choice_data_list: Wow... Have you read the whole collection?
Wow... Have you read the whole collection?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I started reading these on the days I wasn't
feeling well, and before I knew it, I was hooked.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...My body can't handle a lot of strain, so I
thought I should try to learn more about racing
through its history instead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'll do whatever I can... so that one day, I will
leave my mark on racing history.
choice_data_list: You work so hard even when you're not training.
You work so hard even when you're not training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
No, it's nothing, really. I just do it because I want
to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, are there any books you would
recommend besides training guides?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know there's definitely a book that's perfect for
someone with a frail constitution like Mejiro
Ardan. If I recall correctly, the title should be...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
A cookbook! That sounds wonderful. I would love
some healthy recipes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm actually quite the chef despite my
appearance. ♪ My nanny taught me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'll check it out and start reading it today. I'm sure
I can strengthen my body with the right diet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan smiles gently and goes off to look
for the book.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, interesting... I certainly rest more than the
average person, so knowing the best way to sleep
would be a great help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm glad I asked you. I'll read it straight
away and put its teachings into practice tonight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Mejiro Ardan's sleep quality will improve
with help from the book. Hopefully that means
her condition will also get a little better.
